nasb.text: There shall be two tenons for each board, fitted to one another; thus you shall do for all the boards of the tabernacle.

esv.text: There shall be two tenons in each frame, for fitting together. So shall you do for all the frames of the tabernacle.

cnv.text: 每塊木板要有兩個榫頭，彼此連接，會幕的一切木板你都要這樣做。

ccb.text: 每块木板要有两个接榫，好连接在一起。圣幕的所有木板都要这样。
